parameters.subject: Welcome to {{ $json.plan }}! Your account is ready 🎉
parameters.text:
Hi {{ $json.customerName }},

Welcome aboard! Your account has been created.

🔐 Login Details:
Username: {{ $json.credentials.username }}
Temporary Password: {{ $json.credentials.tempPassword }}
Login URL: {{ $json.credentials.loginUrl }}

📋 Your First Week:
Day 1: Complete profile setup
Day 2: Watch intro video (5 min)
Day 3: Connect first integration
Day 5: Schedule onboarding call
Day 7: Review first-week report

Need help? Reply to this email or book a call: calendly.com/yourcompany/onboarding

Best,
The Onboarding Team
parameters.html:
Hi {{ $json.customerName }},

Welcome aboard! Your account has been created.

🔐 Login Details

  • Username: {{ $json.credentials.username }}
  • Temporary Password: {{ $json.credentials.tempPassword }}
  • Login URL: {{ $json.credentials.loginUrl }}

📋 Your First Week

  1. Day 1: Complete profile setup
  2. Day 2: Watch intro video (5 min)
  3. Day 3: Connect first integration
  4. Day 5: Schedule onboarding call
  5. Day 7: Review first-week report

Need help? Reply to this email or book a call.
